properties.name: Regierungsviertel MVP bounds
properties.description: Landmark-fitted polygon covering Brandenburger Tor, Reichstag, Bundeskanzleramt, Paul-Löbe-Haus, Marie-Elisabeth-Lüders-Haus, Berlin Hauptbahnhof, Haus der Kulturen der Welt ('Schwangere Auster'), the eastern Tiergarten including Luiseninsel playground, and the Tiergartentunnel south entrance at Sony Center / Potsdamer Platz.
properties.source: Convex hull of landmarks.geojson + 180 m buffer, with the owner-requested Luiseninsel playground edge correction
